title: Village Survivors
description:
Grab your pots and pans—defend your home!An army has invaded a quiet village.

No reinforcements, no heroes—just villagers armed with cleavers, hoes, and harpoons, standing as the last line of defense.

Features• 12 characters: Villager, Chef, Farmer, Blacksmith… each with a unique skill, and each brings new weapons!

• 39 weapons: Needle, Shovel, Pot, Logging Axe… unlock them all and build your own playstyle!

• 5 stages × 5 difficulties: fight your way from the outskirts to the castle and beat an army with villagers!

• Permanent upgrades: spend each run's gold on village upgrades to start stronger—or turn them off for an extra challenge.

• Aim your way: weapons attack automatically, and you can switch between auto and manual aim anytime.

• Fast-paced runs of about 20 minutes.

• Keyboard, mouse, and controller support.

• Steam Achievements and Steam Cloud saves.
description_short: Grab your pots and pans—defendyour home! Village Survivors is a lighthearted, comedic survivors-like game (bullet heaven). Play a villager standing up for their home, turn bowls, flower pots, and frying pans into weapons, and level up to mow down an invading army!
